messages.content: Give all subject, relation, and object triplets from the sentence, 'A photo of a woman with long hair wearing a short blue dress rolling with a suitcase on a street with a crowd of people watching her.'.

2. subject: woman, relation: with, object: long hair
3. subject: woman, relation: wearing, object: short blue dress
4. subject: woman, relation: rolling with, object: suitcase
5. subject: woman, relation: on, object: street
6. subject: street, relation: with, object: crowd of people
7. subject: crowd of people, relation: watching, object: her
